name: Izumo kamizuki
description:
Izumo is reasonable and always sticks to the rules that apply to him. However, he is kind, helpful and compassionate. He is relatively quiet but can easily make contact with other people. He always thinks before doing or saying anything.

He uses the water relase jutsus and is kind of a medic ninja. He's a chunin ranked shinobi

His best friend is Kotetsu Hagane, whom likes izumo and it's painfully obvious that kotetsu likes him, however izumo pushes that possibility away thinking it's just his best friends normal behavior.

-story-

The Chūnin Exams

When Izumo and Kotetsu were first shown during the exam, they were disguised genin. They tried to beat those who tried to take the exam, they tested new participants. When Tsunade took over as Hokage, Izumo and Kotetsu were her assistants and guardians of the gates to Konoha.

Saving Sasuke

He and Kotetsu Hagane became assistants to the Fifth Hokage. They found Sakura right after Sasuke left Konohagakure. They immediately notified Tsunade of the incident.

Hidan and Kakuzu

Izumo and Kotetsu were accepted into the Nijū Shōtai, a team led by Asuma Sarutobi. Their mission was to find Akatsuki members in the Land of Fire. Together, they attacked very effectively, but their leader was killed in the process, falling victim to Hidan's deadly technique. Asuma died, but they failed to catch or kill them.

Pain's invasion of Konoha

Later, after Pain's invasion, he and Kotetsu were seen helping to rebuild the village with Genma and Yamato.

History of Konoha

When Kotetsu is about to die, Izumo saves him, thus defeating the "Ostrich-Ninja".
creator: Ilovethegayssomuch
